# Let's open the file and read its content
path = "/mnt/data/file-TPxrYb4Qk5KUxy2XXEg6jf-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
len(raw)

import re, json, textwrap, sys

raw = open("/mnt/data/file-TPxrYb4Qk5KUxy2XXEg6jf-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()

def find_all_occurrences(sub):
    res=[]
    start=0
    while True:
        idx=raw.find(sub,start)
        if idx==-1: break
        res.append(idx)
        start=idx+1
    return res

candidates = {}

# main hadith full
hadith_full = "لا تلبسوا الحرير؛ فإنه من لبسه في الدنيا لم يلبسه في الآخرة"
candidates[hadith_full] = find_all_occurrences(hadith_full)

# hadith subquotes
hadith_no_wear = "لا تلبسوا الحرير"
candidates[hadith_no_wear] = find_all_occurrences(hadith_no_wear)

hadith_consequence = "فإنه من لبسه في الدنيا لم يلبسه في الآخرة"
candidates[hadith_consequence] = find_all_occurrences(hadith_consequence)

# hadith heya lahum
hadith_hiya = "هي لهم في الدنيا، ولكم في الآخرة"
candidates[hadith_hiya] = find_all_occurrences(hadith_hiya)

hadith_fa_innaha = "فإنها لهم في الدنيا، ولكم في الآخرة"
candidates[hadith_fa_innaha] = find_all_occurrences(hadith_fa_innaha)

# hadith two items
hadith_hathan = "هذان حرام على ذكور أمتي حل لإناثها"
candidates[hadith_hathan] = find_all_occurrences(hadith_hathan)

# aya ahzab
ayah_ahzab = "وَلَا تَبَرَّجْنَ تَبَرُّجَ الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ الْأُولَى"
candidates[ayah_ahzab] = find_all_occurrences(ayah_ahzab)

# aya wilibasuhum
ayah_wilbasuhum = "وَلِبَاسُهُمْ فِيهَا حَرِيرٌ"
candidates[ayah_wilbasuhum] = find_all_occurrences(ayah_wilbasuhum)

# aya al-kahf content between ﴿ and ﴾ for the first mention after "سورة الكهف"
# Let's extract text between the first pair of these special quotes.
occurs_bracket = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group()) for m in re.finditer(r"﴿(.*?)﴾", raw, flags=re.S)]
len(occurs_bracket), occurs_bracket[:3], occurs_bracket[-3:]

# Let's compute the spans programmatically
spans = []

def add_span(start, text, citation_type):
    end = start + len(text)
    # Edge trimming: remove surrounding punctuation and quotes from edges if present in raw
    # We'll handle trimming explicitly per rule: remove from edges quotes or punctuation if present
    # But since we intentionally choose text only without quotes, we shouldn't need trimming.
    assert raw[start:end] == text, (
        "Mismatch at indices {}:{} expected '{}' got '{}'".format(
            start, end, text, raw[start:end]
        )
    )
    spans.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": text, "citation_type": citation_type})

# Hadith: full phrase - positions 167 and 947
hadith_full = "لا تلبسوا الحرير؛ فإنه من لبسه في الدنيا لم يلبسه في الآخرة"
for pos in candidates[hadith_full]:
    add_span(pos, hadith_full, "Hadeeth")

# Hadith: no wear only at 2601 (determine context)
for pos in candidates["لا تلبسوا الحرير"]:
    # exclude those that belong to full hadith occurrences (which are at 167 and 947)
    if pos in (167, 947): 
        continue
    # we will inspect context around pos to ensure it's a hadith quote
    ctx = raw[max(0,pos-100):pos+len("لا تلبسوا الحرير")+100]
    # print(pos, ctx)
    # choose pos 2601 only exclude 2751 which is not in quotes? Let's inspect char before and after
    # But we can use logic: the next char after pos+len==2601+len is the following char in text; Not reliable.
    pass

add_span(2601, "لا تلبسوا الحرير", "Hadeeth")

# Hadith: consequence only at positions except overlapped ones; include 2954
for pos in candidates["فإنه من لبسه في الدنيا لم يلبسه في الآخرة"]:
    if pos in (185, 965): 
        continue
    add_span(pos, "فإنه من لبسه في الدنيا لم يلبسه في الآخرة", "Hadeeth")

# Hadith: heya lahum occurrences at 1434 and 1544
for pos in candidates["هي لهم في الدنيا، ولكم في الآخرة"]:
    add_span(pos, "هي لهم في الدنيا، ولكم في الآخرة", "Hadeeth")

# Hadith: fa innaha at 4220
add_span(4220, "فإنها لهم في الدنيا، ولكم في الآخرة", "Hadeeth")

# Hadith hathan at 2704
add_span(2704, "هذان حرام على ذكور أمتي حل لإناثها", "Hadeeth")

# Ayah: al-ahzab phrase at 330
add_span(330, "وَلَا تَبَرَّجْنَ تَبَرُّجَ الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ الْأُولَى", "Aya")

# Ayah: ولباسهم occurrences - include 432, 630, 3134, 3244; exclude 2367 overlapping long al-hajj
for pos in candidates["وَلِبَاسُهُمْ فِيهَا حَرِيرٌ"]:
    if pos == 2367: 
        continue
    add_span(pos, "وَلِبَاسُهُمْ فِيهَا حَرِيرٌ", "Aya")

# Extract al-Kahf bracket content indices
import re
matches = list(re.finditer(r"﴿(.*?)﴾", raw, flags=re.S))
for i,m in enumerate(matches):
    print(i, m.start(), m.end())
    print(raw[m.start():m.end()][:50])
    print("... last 50:", raw[m.start():m.end()][-50:])
    print()

# 0 index appears to be Al-Kahf; 1 is Al-Hajj; 2 and 3 are in [3] "وَلِبَاسُهُمْ ..." small.
m0 = matches[0]
al_kahf_inside_start = m0.start()+1
al_kahf_inside_end   = m0.end()-1
print("al_kahf span check:", raw[al_kahf_inside_start:al_kahf_inside_end])

# Now extract al-Hajj, matches[1]
m1 = matches[1]
al_hajj_inside = raw[m1.start()+1:m1.end()-1]
print("al_hajj_inside start idx", m1.start()+1, "end idx", m1.end()-1)
print(al_hajj_inside)

# find positions of "(٢٣)" and "(٢٤)"
idx_23 = al_hajj_inside.find("(٢٣)")
idx_24 = al_hajj_inside.find("(٢٤)")
idx_23, idx_24, al_hajj_inside[idx_23-20: idx_23+20], al_hajj_inside[idx_24-20: idx_24+20]

# Determine spans for v23 and v24
# Determine end of v23 as the char before the space preceding "(" if there's a space; 
# We'll find the index just before idx_23 and trim trailing whitespace.
v23_end_idx = idx_23
# Trim whitespace before, but we will extract up to v23_end_idx, excluding trailing spaces if present.
while v23_end_idx>0 and al_hajj_inside[v23_end_idx-1] == " ":
    v23_end_idx -= 1

v23_text = al_hajj_inside[:v23_end_idx]
print("v23_text:", v23_text)

# v24 start: after "(٢٣)"; there may be a space after the close parenthesis
v24_start_idx = idx_23 + len("(٢٣)")
# Skip spaces or punctuation after it
while v24_start_idx < len(al_hajj_inside) and al_hajj_inside[v24_start_idx] in " \u200f\u200e":
    v24_start_idx += 1

# Determine end before "(٢٤)"
v24_end_idx = idx_24
# Trim trailing spaces before "("
while v24_end_idx>v24_start_idx and al_hajj_inside[v24_end_idx-1] == " ":
    v24_end_idx -= 1

v24_text = al_hajj_inside[v24_start_idx:v24_end_idx]
print("v24_text:", v24_text)

# Now compute global indices for these texts:
v23_global_start = m1.start()+1
v23_global_end = m1.start()+1 + v23_end_idx
print("v23 global indices:", v23_global_start, v23_global_end, "text:", raw[v23_global_start:v23_global_end]==v23_text)

v24_global_start = m1.start()+1 + v24_start_idx
v24_global_end = m1.start()+1 + v24_end_idx
print("v24 global indices:", v24_global_start, v24_global_end, "text:", raw[v24_global_start:v24_global_end]==v24_text)

# Add al-kahf span
add_span(1866, raw[1866:2041], "Aya")

# Add al-hajj v23 and v24 spans
add_span(2198, raw[2198:2395], "Aya")
add_span(2401, raw[2401:2475], "Aya")

len(spans)

# Find all substrings inside standard double quotes "
import re
double_quoted = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group()) for m in re.finditer(r"\"([^\"]+)\"", raw)]
len(double_quoted), double_quoted[:10]

# Find all text inside double parentheses (( ... ))
dbl_paren = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group()) for m in re.finditer(r"\(\((.*?)\)\)", raw, flags=re.S)]
len(dbl_paren), dbl_paren
